name: llm-wiki
description: Compile messy document directories into Karpathy-style llm_wiki knowledge bases. Skills: wiki-build (full compile), wiki-ingest (incremental), wiki-query (cited Q&A), wiki-lint (health check), wiki-connect (wire a KB into a project), wiki-distill (episodic memory -> wiki pages). Deterministic work is done by the bundled @sdsrs/llm-wiki CLI via npx.
